fixed.soul_keyword_bar: raised min_keywords 2->3 on 7 souls with 6-7 keyword lists; min_chars floor 200 — reduces pass-by-luck

by_design_not_fixed: soul verifiers remain heuristic (assert facet engagement, not expertise) and are SECONDARY per DECISIONS.md D3; the brutal tier carries the tight soul discrimination (soul_music_theory, soul_science_calc).
baseline_dependency: these tightened cases + the brutal tier require a FRESH lite-v1 full-suite baseline before it serves as the reap25 gate; the prior committed 30/30 predates the brutal tier and this tightening. No extra GPU cost — folds into the already-required re-baseline.
